# Navigation map outputs (generated by scripts/run_navigation_map.sh)

| File | For |
| --- | --- |
| `navigation_map_ux.html` | **Send to UX** — open in browser; keep `screenshots/` alongside |
| `navigation_map.md` | Dev reference with embedded image links |
| `navigation_flow.mmd` | Mermaid flowchart (paste into mermaid.live) |
| `screenshots/` | PNG captures per screen |
| `session.json` | Raw session data |

```bash
./scripts/run_navigation_map.sh
```

Zip for sharing: `cd test_outputs/navigation_map && zip -r ../sanctum-nav-map.zip navigation_map_ux.html screenshots navigation_flow.mmd`
